notes: Populate this file from current official state wildlife agency regulations. Only officially published statewide opener dates should be included. States with unpublished dates should remain absent or have an empty seasons array. If a state has only 1 or 2 confirmed season opener dates, publish only those confirmed records. ZIP-specific exceptions may be stored under zipOverrides. Only seasons present in a state's seasons array will appear on CampCalendar.

seasons.title: Minnesota Firearms Deer Opener
seasons.description: Statewide deer firearms opener across the main A-season permit areas.

seasons.description: Statewide archery and crossbow deer opener.

TX.source: Texas Parks and Wildlife hunting season dates

seasons.title: Texas Archery White-tailed Deer Opener
seasons.description: Archery opener in 252 of 254 counties for the 2025-26 season year.
seasons.scopeNote: Confirm county regulations for the camp ZIP before relying on this opener.

seasons.title: Texas General White-tailed Deer Opener
seasons.description: General white-tailed deer opener in the North and South zones for the 2025-26 season year.
seasons.scopeNote: Confirm county regulations for the camp ZIP before relying on this opener.

seasons.title: Texas Muzzleloader White-tailed Deer Opener
seasons.description: Muzzleloader-only opener in 90 of 254 counties for the 2025-26 season year.
seasons.scopeNote: Confirm county regulations for the camp ZIP before relying on this opener.
